MCV [Entitic mean volume] in Red Blood Cells by Automated count
MCHC [Entitic Mass/volume] in Red Blood Cells by Automated count

Platelet distribution width [Entitic volume] in Blood by Automated count
Platelet [Entitic mean volume] in Blood by Automated count

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The results show elevated hemoglobin and hematocrit, which may suggest relative or absolute erythrocytosis; further clinical correlation and assessment of hydration status are recommended. Platelet distribution width is also increased, which may indicate platelet anisocytosis but with normal platelet count. Other parameters are within normal limits. No acute cytopenias or leukocytosis detected.
Leukocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
